actions.value:
Hi,
 

Your screenshot looks like the phone has a text size setting which may be preventing you from being able to see a button or something to type in that screen.
 

Could you please go into your phone settings and try turning down the default text size (temporarily)? I'm sorry if you need to ask somebody for help with that.
 

Once that is done, I think you will be able to proceed with ease - but please let me know if you have any other questions or concerns!
